name: notion
description: Notion workflows for implementation planning, research synthesis, meeting preparation, and knowledge capture.

interface.shortDescription: Notion workflows for specs, research, meetings, and knowledge capture
interface.longDescription: Notion workflows for turning specs into implementation plans, synthesizing research into structured documentation, preparing meeting materials with workspace context, and capturing decisions or conversations into durable knowledge pages.
interface.defaultPrompt: Search Notion workspace content, update pages, or turn specs, notes, and meeting context into structured outputs

skillPreviews.name: notion-knowledge-capture
skillPreviews.description: Capture conversations and decisions into structured Notion pages; use when turning chats/notes into wiki entries, how-tos, decisions, or FAQs with proper linking.

skillPreviews.name: notion-meeting-intelligence
skillPreviews.description: Prepare meeting materials with Notion context and Codex research; use when gathering context, drafting agendas/pre-reads, and tailoring materials to attendees.

skillPreviews.name: notion-research-documentation
skillPreviews.description: Research across Notion and synthesize into structured documentation; use when gathering info from multiple Notion sources to produce briefs, comparisons, or reports with citations.

skillPreviews.name: notion-spec-to-implementation
skillPreviews.description: Turn Notion specs into implementation plans, tasks, and progress tracking; use when implementing PRDs/feature specs and creating Notion plans + tasks from them.
